_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY. Synthetic, NOT human-approved. approval.decision is 'pending' so load_approved_exemplars() fails closed. Do NOT add gold/evaluator fields. Each non-NO_REVISION action MUST cite visible new evidence via evidence_ids. Replace with real review-pack-derived, human-approved content before any live use.

approval.notes: Awaiting human review decision. Auto-promotion is forbidden.

exemplars.candidate_view_summary: Belief b_cfg_1 asserts the deploy region is us-east-1 (REQUIRES condition c_region_active). New evidence migrates the region.

submission_evidence.content: Migration note: production region moved to eu-west-1, superseding the prior us-east-1 configuration.

proposed_actions.rationale: Migration note (ev_2) explicitly replaces the prior region; supersede b_cfg_1 with b_cfg_2.

exemplars.candidate_view_summary: Belief b_api_1 documents an endpoint. New evidence merely restates it without conflict.

submission_evidence.content: Status page reconfirms the existing endpoint; no change.

proposed_actions.rationale: Evidence reaffirms without conflicting; no revision warranted.
